overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, featuring futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective pavement. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing dense urban commercial buildings with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with construction barriers

events.description: passing large yellow utility structure on the left side
exiting covered walkway section into more open street area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past construction barriers and a yellow grated utility structure

entered.detail: large yellow grated metal structure resembling a subway entrance or utility vent
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the walkway edge
tall street lamp with horizontal light fixture illuminating the sidewalk
arched metal framework with orange neon tube lights spanning across the street
towering dark skyscrapers with illuminated windows and vertical neon signage
large floating digital advertisement screens displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive yellow tactile paving. The path is lined with construction barriers and a large yellow utility structure on the left. Overhead, an arched framework with orange neon lights spans the street between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with holographic advertising

events.description: passing a parked purple sports car on the right side
holographic billboards overhead change content from car ads to food ads

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past parked vehicles and under changing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: sleek purple sports car parked along the curb

entered.detail: futuristic purple sports car with aerodynamic design parked on the street
large blue-tinted holographic display showing food items and text
illuminated sign with 'JAPANTOWN' text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to reveal a wider street with the covered section receding behind. A distinctive purple sports car is parked on the right, while massive holographic billboards float overhead displaying changing advertisements. The camera continues forward along the yellow-tiled sidewalk past the Japantown signage.

events.description: turning left to enter the pedestrian crosswalk
crossing the wet street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and crossing the street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead into the crosswalk
person in yellow jacket crossing from the left side

entered.detail: yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on wet reflective asphalt
red pedestrian signal box with illuminated yellow walk symbol
tall palm trees with green fronds lining the street corner

segments.scene_description: Approaching an intersection, the camera turns left onto a crosswalk. Other pedestrians are visible crossing the wet street. A pedestrian signal box displays a yellow walk symbol, and palm trees line the street corner as the scene opens up to reveal the surrounding skyscrapers from the middle of the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins along a covered walkway marked by yellow tactile paving and construction barriers, moving beneath an arched framework of orange neon lights that bridge towering skyscrapers. As the path opens up, the covered section recedes to reveal a broader street featuring a parked purple sports car and massive floating holographic billboards. The camera continues forward past Japantown signage before turning left onto a wet crosswalk. Finally, the scene expands fully at the intersection, passing a yellow pedestrian signal and palm trees to reveal the surrounding skyline of skyscrapers.
